message:
feat: concurrent agent work batch — channel, plan, transport, CI gates, and codec refinements

Batch commit of concurrent agent work spanning 21 files across multiple
subsystems. These changes appeared during the commit session from parallel
agent activity on the same codebase.

Channel & Session:
  - oneshot.rs: continued receiver protocol refinements
  - session.rs: session channel alignment with updated patterns

Structured Concurrency:
  - cx/scope.rs: scope join and drain refinements
  - plan/mod.rs, plan/fixtures.rs: planner infrastructure improvements
    and test fixture updates

Decoding & RaptorQ:
  - decoding.rs: further format cleanup
  - raptorq/decoder.rs, linalg.rs, tests.rs: continued policy-driven
    decoder refinements and test alignment

Networking & Transport:
  - http/h1/codec.rs: resolve merge conflict (ours side retained —
    duplicate header detection via helper functions already present)
  - transport/router.rs: routing logic simplification (-80 lines)
  - net/quic_core/mod.rs: QUIC transport adjustments

Distributed & Sync:
  - distributed/recovery.rs, snapshot.rs: recovery protocol refinements
  - sync/semaphore.rs: semaphore adjustments
  - record/region.rs: region tracking extensions

Runtime & Types:
  - runtime/task_handle.rs: task handle lifecycle updates
  - gen_server.rs: import reordering and receiver mutability alignment
  - types/budget.rs: budget type refinements

Tests:
  - ci_regression_gates.rs: +175 lines of new CI regression gate tests
  - distributed_spawn.rs: distributed spawn test updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
